flow_points: South Africa lost 3 wickets in Powerplay, failing to build a stable foundation.
JJ Bumrah delivered a match-defining spell for India, taking 3 wickets for just 15 runs with an economy of 3.75.
DA Miller anchored South Africa's innings, contributing 33.7% of the team's runs.
Indian bowlers HH Pandya (economy 11.25), CV Varun (economy 12.0), and S Dube (economy 16.0) proved expensive.
India then struggled in their Powerplay, losing 3 wickets for only 31 runs.
M Jansen sustained defensive pressure for South Africa, taking 4 wickets for 23 runs (impact 144.33).
KA Maharaj's crucial spell added 3 wickets for 24 runs to dismantle India's chase.
C Bosch contributed with an effective spell of 2 wickets for just 12 runs.
India struggled under extreme chase pressure (Index: 90.0), leading to a late-innings collapse.
South Africa secured a dominant victory by 76 runs.
